batch_summary.note: S-006: financial record compilation Aug 4 2024 (ROW-6334) — 'show all the times you've paid daycare late.' ARC-RF06-001 promotes to ACTIVE at Signal 6.

messages.text: You're late on the daycare payment
Then show all the times you've paid daycare late, not paid child support, not showed up to parent teacher conferences for two years

primary_flags.classification: RF-06 primary Sev-1 — ROW-6334 is a significant escalation: Melissa challenges Eli to 'show all the times' he's paid late/missed support/missed conferences — this is a financial record compilation framing, building a legal narrative of financial non-compliance. Deployed within the EP-0854 311-message mega-cluster (Aug 4, 2024). Per ADD-004: using financial history to establish war-of-attrition leverage. ARC-RF06-001 Signal 6. ARC-RF06-001 promotes to ACTIVE.
primary_flags.addendum_applied: ADD-004 (war of attrition — financial history invoked as leverage). ADD-005 (payment pressure co-deployed with conflict escalation — EP-0854 context).
